ofm.title: OnlyFans 2026 crackdown is real and brutal.
ofm.summary: Biometric verification + AI detection tools (Hive Moderation, Reality Defender) now active. Accounts running undisclosed AI content report **30-40% revenue drops**. Human must press 'send' on every DM — AI chatbots prohibited from sending messages.

ofm.title: Sozee emerges as the #1 AI content tool for agencies.
ofm.summary: Upload just 3 photos → generate unlimited realistic content. Agencies pairing Sozee with Supercreator (chat) and Zapier/Gumloop (workflows) report **50%+ revenue growth** and 10x content output.

ofm.title: AI model economics are brutal.
ofm.summary: 80% of AI model operators earn under $500/month (median $200-500). Real creators with management earn $5K-$50K/month — 10x the AI ceiling. The people making the most money are selling courses about AI models, not running them.

ofm.title: Fanvue is the only major platform allowing fully synthetic AI creators.
ofm.summary: They have Voice AI for automated voice notes and Analytics AI for account insights. OnlyFans explicitly bans fully AI-generated models.

ofm.title: Instagram DM automation is the biggest growth lever.
ofm.summary: Tools like Inrō and ManyChat driving **2-3x conversion rates** by funneling social traffic to OnlyFans via comment-to-DM triggers and follow-up sequences.

tools.title: Claude Code March 2026 adds multi-agent systems.
tools.summary: New features: `/loop` command for cron-style recurring tasks, `/schedule` for one-time tasks, Agent Teams (multiple Claude Code instances working in parallel with one orchestrator). Opus 4.6 is default with 1M token context window (5x larger).

tools.title: OpenClaw 2026.3.2 released.
tools.summary: New task board and status handling, richer agent defaults, expanded channel/plugin support. 45 new features, 13 breaking changes, 82 bug fixes. Focus: "stuff that makes OpenClaw trustworthy enough to run on real workflows."

tools.title: 40% of business processes predicted to be agent-managed by end of 2026.
tools.summary: Agentic AI workflows transforming from passive tools to autonomous decision-makers in enterprise.

tools.title: AI agent workflow patterns maturing.
tools.summary: RAG (retrieval-augmented generation), prompt templates with grounded context, and CrewAI framework for role-based agents becoming standard. Pattern: specific role → goal → backstory → execution.

tools.title: Workflow automation ROI proven.
tools.summary: Agencies using full-funnel automation (content gen → approval → scheduling → fan engagement → PPV → analytics) see **25% labor cost reduction** and 95%+ response rates on DM automation.

market.title: Puerto Escondido real estate accelerating hard.
market.summary: National property values projected 8-9% appreciation; coastal markets like PE expected **9-12%** driven by limited beachfront inventory. Zicatela beachfront now $400K-$1.2M USD; La Punta premium properties saw **20-25% gains in 2025**.

market.title: Los Tamarindos (Colotepec) infrastructure upgrades confirmed.
market.summary: Municipal water system upgrades, road paving, enhanced drainage systems planned for 2025-2026. Large beachfront lots (1,000-3,000 sqm) still available at **$80K-$250K** — strongest value play as development pushes south.

market.title: PE International Airport transformation reshaping values.
market.summary: Houston route operational since spring 2025; additional Canadian and U.S. routes planned for 2026. United Airlines already flying; more connections in planning. Direct correlation between air connectivity and vacation rental demand/property values.

market.title: Rammed earth construction advancing in Mexico.
market.summary: Casa Ballena (Los Cabos) using prefabricated rammed earth blocks — more control, reduced construction time, lower costs. Baja Blox operating in Baja California Norte offering compressed earth block alternatives. Earth USA 2026 conference in Santa Fe (Sept 18-20) covering adobe, rammed earth, compressed earth.

market.title: Tulum ATV rental market saturated.
market.summary: TulumATVRental claims "no competitors" aggressively. Lagoon Company website ranking well. Aventuras Mayas offering combo tours (archaeological + ATV). Multi-day rental prices: $85/day, $300/week, $600/month from area competitors.

actions.text: OFM Agency:: Test Sozee for content generation — 3 photos to unlimited content is worth evaluating. Audit current chat automation stack; if not using Supercreator or similar, you're bleeding labor costs. Review Instagram DM automation setup — this is the highest-leverage growth channel right now.
AI/Automation:: Evaluate Claude Code's new `/loop` and `/schedule` commands for automating daily/weekly workflows. The multi-agent system could accelerate development work significantly.

Puerto Escondido:: Move fast on Colotepec land if you're still considering additional acquisition. Infrastructure upgrades + airport expansion = that $80K-$250K window is closing. Consider attending Earth USA 2026 (Sept) for rammed earth networking and contractor connections.

Lagoon Company:: Competitor claiming "no competitors" — opportunity to differentiate harder on experience/service. Monitor their pricing; if they're giving away free tequila bottles, that's a margin race to the bottom.
